body_txt:
When it comes to humanized anthropomorphic animals, whether they are Funny Animals or essentially humans with animal traits , they are usually based on only one species of animal. If Interspecies Romance occurs between different species, one question that will naturally pop up among fans is the idea of what their kids would be like. Some stories avoid answering the question by not having animal characters of different species get together, while others answer it by having the children be the species of only one parent . However, some works decide to make it a fact that animal hybrids are a possibility. Generally speaking, the in-story logic behind this trope is that while anthro animals might be based on different species of animals, the species they are based on function more like an ethnicity or a race than their biological species. Said children are usually half-and-half hybrids, but Uneven Hybrids aren't unheard of. In addition, it's also possible for said characters to be Artificial Hybrids rather than the result of sexual reproduction. A Sub-Trope of Mix-and-Match Critter , though unlike most such critters, these types of creatures are usually treated less like monsters or feral animals and more like people. Sub-Trope of Non-Human Humanoid Hybrid .
Might benefit from Hybrid Power or suffer from Hybrids Are a Crapshoot . Likely to suffer from Half-Breed Discrimination and/or Half-Breed Angst . While most are hybrids between two species, Heinz Hybrids are sometimes possible. Can sometimes result in Patchwork Kids . Compare/Contrast Cartoon Creature , for creatures that often have traits of multiple animals, but it isn't clear what exactly they are. If it is obvious or explicitly stated what mix of creatures a character is, it falls under this trope. Otherwise, it's a Cartoon Creature.
